title: OPSponges
body:
# OPSponges
OPSponges is a Fabric mod for Minecraft that enhances sponge functionality for effortless large-scale water removal.

## ✨ What This Mod Does:
Infinite Water Drying: Sponges absorb water in an infinite range.

## 📺 YouTube Short
Check out a quick demo:
